summary: Iteration 3: Verified the huge launch batch (clan challenges, 3h pair cooldown + admin override, map timers grace/prayer, archive + 2h cooldown, leave cooldown, admin user/clan edits, forgot-password admin flow, monthly Arabic league, leaderboard, blacklist with proof, tournaments losers_bracket, live streams, profile streaming URLs, RIVALS branding). Added 15 new pytest cases in test_rivals_launch.py and they all pass alongside the 29 pre-existing tests in test_rivals.py — 44/44 pytest green. Playwright smoke verified AuthPage (RIVALS branding, no 'Arena', forgot-password button, Activision ID input on register tab), AdminPage (login works, dispute list rendered, Blacklist nav link present), BlacklistPage (player-name/cheat-tool/details/proof file inputs visible), TournamentsPage (create modal contains 'الفرصة الثانية' losers_bracket checkbox), and ProfilePage at /me (ACT input + Twitch/Kick/TikTok URL inputs + Save button + Plus toggle).

minor.issue: trophies field is only present on clan documents that ever pushed to the trophies array. Mongo projection {'trophies':1} silently omits the key for older clans. Frontend should default to [].

Response shape stores grace_started_at + grace_started_by_clan but no grace_ends_at field — clients must compute (started_at + 10min - prayer-extension) themselves. The 'maps/timer' GET endpoint exposes ends_at but the mutating endpoints do not. Acceptable but worth documenting.
Requires max_participants (2..16). Frontend modal must validate this client-side.

action_items: Optional: have backend expose grace_ends_at directly in /maps/{idx}/grace response to avoid duplicate clock math in frontend.
Optional: leaderboard endpoint could $ifNull trophies to [] for consistent response shape.
Live Twitch detection returns gracefully (null) since TWITCH_CLIENT_ID/SECRET env keys not yet provided — this is expected per the request, no action needed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 2388 lines — strongly recommend splitting into routers (auth, clans, matches, challenges, blacklist, tournaments, admin) before more features ship.

Tag uniqueness is case-sensitive in /api/admin/clans/{id} edit — a clan with tag 'RNM' cannot be re-assigned 'RNM' if another already owns it; surfacing 'التاج مستخدم' is good but consider scoped uniqueness check that ignores the current clan's own tag.

Challenge create endpoint URL parameter clan_id == challenger's own clan is non-obvious; consider renaming to /api/challenges with body {challenger_id, opponent_id} for clarity, or document in OpenAPI description.
Frontend ProfilePage route is /me; the request originally referenced 'ProfilePage' which suggested /profile. Either alias both routes or update docs/tests.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (auth/register/admin/blacklist/tournaments/profile pages all render with required data-testids and Arabic copy)

test_credentials: admin@rivals.gg / Admin@12345 (verified). Owner: prev@rivals.gg / Prev@Rivals2026 (not exercised this iteration). New users registered via /api/auth/register must include `act`.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_* clans and lb_* users via /api/auth/register; ~15 additional users + clans persisted in db (cleanup not aggressive).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend launch tests at /app/backend/tests/test_rivals_launch.py. Together with test_rivals.py = 44 tests. Profile page is /me (not /profile). Challenge endpoint expects clan_id in URL = challenger's OWN clan id, with body {opponent_clan_id, notes}. Tournament POST requires max_participants. Grace timer response uses grace_started_at + grace_started_by_clan (no grace_ends_at in mutating response — GET maps/timer exposes ends_at).
rca of the issue: n/a — no blocking bugs. The initial 6 launch test failures were test-contract mismatches (wrong challenge endpoint URL, missing tournament.max_participants, wrong grace field names, hard tag collision in admin clan edit). All fixed in the test file; backend behaviour matches spec.
